titleStmt.title: SII 35.132: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 132. (A.R. No. 287 of 1952-53.) ANUGONḌA, KURNOOL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated in the Chālukya year 49, [Pra]mādi, Vishu-saṅkrānti, the other details being lost. It corresponds to A.D. 1125.

It states that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kūcha • • rala, brother of Ghaṭeyaṁka • • , granted a piece of land for the expenses of offerings and worship to god Bhīmēśvara. The gift is stated to have been made for the merit of Uttama-Chōḷadēva and Kūchādēvi. The donor bears a string of Telugu-Chōḷa birudas commencing with the introduction charaṇa-sarōruha, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
hāvihāta vilōcana tri
mukhākhiḷa prithvīsvarakāritakārvara
laratna pradipāhita tripā
nmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ ghaṭeyaṁka
hārājara tammaṁ kūca
rasaru cāḷukya vikrama varṣada 49
mādi saṁvatsarada viṣusaṁkrānti
ttamuttamacōḷadēvaṁgaṁ kūcā
dēvigaṁ puṇya phaḷavāge bhīmēsvara
dēvarige pūje punaskāra dhūpa
dīpa nivēdya pavitra caitrakke Udeyarā
sijīyarige dhārāpūrbakaṁ māḍi ko
ṭṭa baḍaga poladali mattaru 10
dēgulada nairutyadali tōṁṭa kammaṁ
225 gāṇa 1 Iṁti dharmmamaṁ kiḍisi
davaru vāraṇāsilkavileya
brāhmaṇaranaḷida pātakamakkuṁ .
śrīmatut tāyanāyakana putra gō
trapavitraṁ kōṭiyacāpuranettisida
sivālayama maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
Digital edition of SII 35.132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
